message:
The other day, I was enjoying a peaceful afternoon when my dog, Charlie, decided it was the perfect time to chase a squirrel. As I rushed outside to call him back, I suddenly realized I was still in my pajamas, hair a mess, and barefoot. Classic! 😅 

While I was trying to wrangle Charlie back from his new furry friend, I thought about how often we think we’re ready for anything—until life throws a little curveball. Being prepared doesn’t always mean having everything together; sometimes it just means being ready for the unexpected moments. 

So, I took a deep breath, laughed it off, and made a mental note to have my shoes by the door next time. 

Do you have any funny stories about not being ready? I'd love to hear them! P.S. this little refresher helped me remember the importance of staying prepared, even in my jammies!
